title: Duke Realty increases by 10% after proposed acquisition announcement
text: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD), a leading logistics real estate company, recently sent a letter to the Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of Duke Realty Corporation, James Connor, proposing to buy Duke in all-stock deal. This announcement saw Duke Realty stock grow by 10%.

title: Prologis: US logistics real estate market hits record-low 16-month supply
text: Several data points provided Wednesday by logistics real estate provider Prologis showed warehouse space is likely to remain constrained for some time. A new metric, “true months of supply (TMS),” which compares current vacancies plus the development pipeline to trailing net absorption, has fallen to 16 months in Prologis' 30 U.S. markets.

title: Duke Realty stock rallies after it calls Prologis' latest buyout bid 'insufficient'
text: Shares of Duke Realty Corp. DRE, +8.29% shot up 8.5% in morning trading Wednesday, after the logistics real estate investment trust said the recent buyout proposal from fellow REIT Prologis Inc. PLD, +2.12% was "insufficient." Prologis shares gained 2.5%.

title: This REIT Behemoth Is Going Hostile to Get Even Bigger
text: Prologis is making its offer to acquire Duke Realty public.

title: Prologis offers to buy Duke Realty for $24B
text: Logistics real estate giant Prologis announced Tuesday a proposal to acquire competitor Duke Realty in an all-stock transaction valued at $24 billion. An offer price of $61.68 per share for Duke Realty (NYSE: DRE) represents a 29% premium to Monday's closing price and a 32% premium based on the 30-day volume weighted averages.

title: Prologis offers to buy Duke Realty for $61.68 per share
text: Prologis Inc, a warehouse real estate company, said on Tuesday it had offered to buy Duke Realty Corp for $61.68 per share in an all-stock deal.

title: Prologis makes new offer to acquire Duke Realty for $61.68 in an all-stock deal
text: Prologis Inc. PLD, -6.04% said Tuesday it is proposing to acquire Duke Realty Corp. DRE, -4.12% for $61.68 a share in an all-stock deal. Under the terms of the offer, Duke Realty shareholders would receive 0.466 shares of Prologis, valued at $61.68, or a premium of 29% over Duke's closing price on Monday.

title: Third Avenue Curtails Trinity Place Holdings Investment
text: Third Avenue Management (Trades, Portfolio) revealed last week it curbed its stake in Trinity Place Holdings Inc. ( TPHS , Financial) by 15.78%.
